'''Threadneedle Canyon''' was a canyon leading to a town on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nadiem/Legends|Nadiem]]. A stream flowed through the canyon into a river on the outskirts of the nearby [[City/Legends|town]]. Also, part of the [[Battle of Nadiem]] was fought in Threadneedle Canyon.<ref name="Hide" />

{{Nature-stub}}
